confidence_rationale: Clear visual evidence of proper technique and hand sequencing. Video appears to end mid-task during reverse phase. Time stamps and phase transitions well documented.
cannot_determine: Final completion time - video ends during reverse phase
Total penalty for incomplete objects - unclear how many reverse transfers remain
technique_summary: Competent technique with proper hand sequencing and midair transfers. Forward phase completed successfully but video ends during reverse phase at 1/6 completion.
strengths: Proper hand switching between forward and reverse directions
improvement_suggestions: Increase overall speed - 219s for partial completion suggests novice-level timing
Focus on completing both directions within time limit
